title: helianthemum lavandulifolium subsp. thibaudii
intro: Helianthemum lavandulifolium subsp. thibaudii, also known as the Thibaud's rockrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum lavandulifolium subsp. thibaudii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support cardiovascular health and promote relaxation.
